description:
Operating Area: Croatia

The rare ability of M/Y Yolo
As much mini cruise ship as a motor yacht, Yolo holds that rare ability to carry up to 30 passengers (any more than 12 guests requires special licensing).

Less is more?
Of course, you don’t have to sail with maximum complement, but a group of, say, 10 to 20, in a 45.5m / 160ft yacht and you have room enough to enjoy a little sundeck yoga in solitude, while kids have room enough to run around without disturbing you. When it comes to partying, no yacht could be better equipped, with her bar on the top deck complete with jacuzzi under the stars, while any little ones are soundly asleep two decks below.

amenities.label: Sun loungers on the sun deck

crew.name: ANTE ŠERKA
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Born in 1981 in Vancouver to a Brač family of master shipbuilders, Ante grew up in the family yard learning wooden-boat construction. He earned his
captain’s license at 20 and has commanded a growing family fleet ever since. In 2019 he built and became the owner-operator of YOLO, which he has captained from launch to date. Hands-on year-round, he knows every system aboard and keeps the yacht in peak condition.
Personal Interests:
Family time, motorcycles, fishing, and all things maritime.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent), German (conversational/professional)

crew.name: IVANA ŠERKA
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
From a yachting family with deep Adriatic connections. Orchestrates cross-department coordination and flawless daily execution; proactive improvements to guest programming.
Personal Interests:
Extroverted, humorous, and high-energy; enjoys family time, swimming, and travel.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: MIRELA TVAROG
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Pedagogy graduate turned luxury-travel creator and agent; now in her 3rd season as YOLO’s Guest Manager. Central liaison for guests and crew, organized, adaptable, and unflappable with last-minute changes.
Personal Interests:
People-centric, detail-driven, and devoted to crafting seamless end-to-end experiences.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: TONI MATULIĆ
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Culinary-school graduate with years in fine-dining restaurants and luxury hotels; additional international training. Creates guest-tailored menus using
fresh, local produce from fishermen, farmers, and butchers at every port. Strong pastry and bakery skills.
Personal Interests:
Warm host who loves crafting memorable multi-course experiences and surprise breads/desserts. “No request is too much.”
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: ELA SKRBINŠEK
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Trained at sea over the last three years under accomplished chefs. Blends a humanities background in English and German with culinary precision; creative, ingredient-driven, and adaptable to charter dynamics.
Personal Interests:Nature, reading, and time with her pet; committed to continual learning.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (fluent), English (fluent), German (professional)

crew.name: MATE RADIĆ
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Maritime-school graduate with strong safety foundations; expert at tender/jet-ski handling, water-toy ops, docking, and exterior maintenance. Known for methodical problem-solving and a perfectionist approach that broadens his remit onboard.
Personal Interests:
Lifelong seafarer who enjoys teaching guests on the water—patient, supportive, and guest-focused. Ambition: future captain.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: MARKO GLAVINIĆ
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Islander, professional diver, and former owner-operator of a water-sports rental company (jet skis focus). Brings entrepreneurial rigor to yacht ops: line handling, mooring, safety cover for water sports, and guest support.
Personal Interests:
Swimming and fishing; recognized for kindness, precision, and safety-first mindset.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: ANTE SAMODOL
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Hospitality professional and former restaurant leader; elevates service through detail, presentation, and beverage pairing. Sommelier knowledge across wines and spirits; excels in signature cocktails and personalized service flows.
Personal Interests:
Quietly witty host who balances precision with warmth.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: NIKOLINA VLADIMIR
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
15+ years in tourism (front-of-house and admin). Transitioned to yachting and quickly became a guest favorite for accuracy, speed, and anticipating preferences.
Personal Interests:
Energetic, authentic, and approachable, creates a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

crew.name: ANĐELKA BEROVIĆ
crew.bio:
Professional Background:
Former professional hairstylist; brings precision, discretion, and aesthetic sensibility to luxury housekeeping. Experienced on yachts; calm, meticulous, and detail-oriented.
Personal Interests:
Travel and long walks; known for an ever-positive spirit and a nurturing service style.
Languages Spoken:
Croatian (native), English (fluent)

pricingInfo.name: Season A (From 02 May 2026 till 16 May 2026) & Season E (From 19 September 2026 till 31 October 2026)
Season B (From 16 May 2026 till 27 June 2026) & Season D (From 29 August 2026 till 19 September 2025)
